# Aliaksei Levashou: Psychotraumatolog, Warsaw

> CBT therapist and psychotraumatologist working with Russian, Polish, and Belarusian speakers across the EU. Specializes in trauma, PTSD, complex PTSD, anxiety, panic, OCD, burnout, depression, and emigration adaptation. Online sessions, 50 minutes, 180 PLN. Free 15-minute intro call available.

Studied at SWPS in Warsaw: clinical health psychology and psychotraumatology. Ongoing 4-year cognitive-behavioral therapy training at INTEREGO (PTTPB-accredited). Regular supervision by a PTTPB supervisor.

## Service pages (Russian)

- [Anxiety therapy](https://levashou.pl/anxiety.html): Generalized anxiety, GAD, panic, social anxiety
- [Panic attacks](https://levashou.pl/panic.html): Including night panic and panic disorder
- [PTSD therapy](https://levashou.pl/ptsd.html): Single-event trauma, flashbacks, hypervigilance
- [Complex PTSD therapy](https://levashou.pl/cptsd.html): Long-term relational trauma
- [Trauma therapy](https://levashou.pl/trauma.html): Three-phase model (stabilization, processing, integration)
- [Burnout therapy](https://levashou.pl/burnout-page.html): For helpers, parents, and overworking professionals
- [Depression therapy](https://levashou.pl/depression.html): CBT protocol, sleep, energy
- [OCD therapy](https://levashou.pl/ocd.html): Intrusive thoughts, ERP exposure protocol
- [Emigration adaptation](https://levashou.pl/emigration.html): Anxiety after relocation, identity, language barrier
- [Gaslighting](https://levashou.pl/gaslighting.html): Recovering trust in own perception
- [Social anxiety](https://levashou.pl/social-anxiety.html)
- [Grief](https://levashou.pl/grief.html): Loss, complicated grief, ambiguous loss
- [Couples therapy](https://levashou.pl/couples.html): Recurring conflicts, distance, trust crisis; online for couples
- [Psychosomatics](https://levashou.pl/psychosomatics.html)
- [Help for loved ones](https://levashou.pl/for-loved-ones.html): When close person refuses therapy
- [Pricing](https://levashou.pl/cennik.html): 180 PLN per 50-minute session

## Self-help practices (interactive)

- [Breathing 4-7-8](https://levashou.pl/breathing-4-7-8.html): Andrew Weil technique for anxiety and sleep
- [Box breathing 4-4-4-4](https://levashou.pl/box-breathing.html): Concentration and calm
- [5-4-3-2-1 grounding](https://levashou.pl/grounding-5-4-3-2-1.html): For panic and flashbacks
- [Thought record diary](https://levashou.pl/diary.html): CBT cognitive restructuring

## Self-screening tests (21 free anonymous tests, Russian and Polish)

- [Test catalog (Russian)](https://levashou.pl/tests.html): GAD-7, PHQ-9, PCL-5 plus original screenings
- [Test catalog (Polish)](https://levashou.pl/tests-pl.html)
- [Adult ADHD screening](https://levashou.pl/tests/adhd.html)
- [Complex PTSD (ICD-11)](https://levashou.pl/tests/cptsd.html)
- [Panic attacks](https://levashou.pl/tests/panic-attacks.html)
- [Insomnia](https://levashou.pl/tests/insomnia.html)
- [Social anxiety](https://levashou.pl/tests/social-anxiety.html)
- [OCD signs](https://levashou.pl/tests/ocd.html)
- [Stress load and recovery](https://levashou.pl/tests/stress.html)
- [Self-esteem](https://levashou.pl/tests/self-esteem.html)
- [Relationship abuse signs](https://levashou.pl/tests/abuse.html)
- [Health anxiety](https://levashou.pl/tests/health-anxiety.html)
- [Emigration adaptation](https://levashou.pl/tests/relocation.html): How relocation really went

## Blog

- [Russian blog](https://levashou.pl/blog.html): 97 long-form articles with cited sources and editorial margin notes
- [Polish blog](https://levashou.pl/blog-pl.html): Polish versions of all articles

## Booking

- [Free 15-min intro call (Russian)](https://levashou.pl/intro.html): pick a slot, link arrives by email
- [Free 15-min intro call (Polish)](https://levashou.pl/intro-pl.html)
- [Paid session booking](https://levashou.pl/cennik.html): 180 PLN, 50 minutes, online

## Languages and location

Sessions available in Russian (русский), Polish (polski), Belarusian (беларуская). Online only, for clients across the EU. Based in Warsaw, Poland (registered business address: pl. Bankowy 2, 00-095 Warszawa; no in-person visits).
